# Copilot Instructions – SemaDoc Data Catalog

## Project Overview

Standalone, static documentation portal for Power BI Semantic Models generated by [SemaDoc](https://semadoc.io). Deliverable to customers as a self-contained package.

The portal contains two pages:
1. **SemaDoc Data Catalog** (`/en/docs-example`) — searchable catalog of all documented Semantic Models
2. **SemaDoc Standalone Viewer** (`/en/viewer`) — client-side Markdown viewer (file upload, no server required)

## Tech Stack

- **Framework**: [Astro](https://astro.build/) (static site generator)
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS 3.x via `@astrojs/tailwind`
- **Language**: TypeScript (strict mode)
- **Output**: Static HTML (`astro build` → `dist/`)
- **Hosting**: Any static host (webspace FTP, S3, Azure Static Web Apps, …)

## Project Structure

```
├── astro.config.mjs          # Astro config (tailwind, sitemap)
├── tailwind.config.mjs       # Tailwind theme (colors, fonts)
├── tsconfig.json             # TypeScript config
├── public/
│   ├── .htaccess             # Clean URLs, .md access block, AI opt-out header
│   ├── robots.txt            # SEO
│   ├── fonts/                # Inter font files (self-hosted)
│   ├── logos/                # SemaDoc logo files
│   ├── images/               # Images
│   └── scripts/
│       └── semadoc-handlers.js  # Client-side: Mermaid, Highlight.js, Dark Mode, Export
├── src/
│   ├── config.ts             # Feature flags (viewer: true)
│   ├── components/
│   │   ├── Button.astro      # CTA button (primary/secondary variants)
│   │   ├── Footer.astro      # Minimal copyright footer
│   │   ├── Header.astro      # Sticky header with 2-item navigation
│   │   ├── ModelDocPage.astro   # Tabbed model detail view
│   │   └── ViewerPage.astro     # Client-side Markdown viewer
│   ├── i18n/
│   │   ├── en.json           # English UI strings
│   │   └── index.ts          # i18n helpers: t(), getLocalizedPath(), getLocaleFromUrl()
│   ├── layouts/
│   │   └── BaseLayout.astro  # Base HTML layout (head, meta, header, footer)
│   ├── data/
│   │   ├── markdown/         # Semantic Model documentation (one subfolder per model)
│   │   └── help/             # Help documentation (English)
│   │       ├── doc_help_en.md
│   │       └── doc_help_detail_en.md
│   ├── pages/
│   │   ├── index.astro                          # Redirect → /en/docs-example
│   │   ├── search-index.json.ts                 # Static search index (build-time)
│   │   └── en/
│   │       ├── docs-example.astro               # Data Catalog overview
│   │       ├── docs-example/
│   │       │   └── [workspace]/
│   │       │       └── [model].astro            # Model detail page (dynamic route)
│   │       └── viewer.astro                     # Standalone Viewer
│   ├── styles/
│   │   └── prose-content.css # Table & prose styles
│   └── utils/
│       ├── markdown.ts       # Markdown rendering utilities (build-time)
│       └── slug.ts           # URL slug helpers
└── scripts/
    └── sanitize_markdown.py  # Utility: sanitize Markdown files before adding to catalog
```

## Data Source

Markdown documentation files live in `src/data/markdown/`. Each subfolder represents one Semantic Model — the subfolder name is the model's display name (used in the catalog sidebar and page title).

```
src/data/markdown/
├── Adventure Works DW 2020/
│   ├── model_documentation.md
│   ├── table_documentation.md
│   ├── measure_documentation.md
│   ├── import_logic_documentation.md
│   ├── calculation_item_documentation.md
│   ├── udf_documentation.md
│   ├── security_documentation.md
│   └── model_quality_documentation.md
└── (further models …)
```

## i18n Architecture

- **Locale**: English only (`en`)
- **Routing**: Prefix-based (`/en/…`), root `/` redirects to `/en/docs-example`
- **UI strings**: `src/i18n/en.json`, accessed via `t(locale)` helper
- **`Locale` type**: Fixed as `'en'` in `src/i18n/index.ts`

## Design System

### Colors (Tailwind custom theme)
- **Primary** (Dark blue): `primary-700: #1a365d` (main brand), `primary-600`, `primary-50`
- **Accent** (Blue): `accent-400` to `accent-600` for highlights
- **Neutral**: `neutral-50` to `neutral-900` for text, backgrounds, borders

### Typography
- Font: Inter (self-hosted via `public/fonts/`)
- Headings: `font-bold text-primary-700`
- Body: `text-neutral-600` / `text-neutral-800`

### Layout Patterns
- Max width: `max-w-6xl` (content)
- Responsive: Mobile-first, `md:` breakpoint for desktop layouts

## Conventions

### Adding a new Semantic Model
1. Create a subfolder under `src/data/markdown/` with the model's display name
2. Add the standard Markdown files (at minimum `model_documentation.md`)
3. Run `npm run build` — the model appears automatically in the catalog, detail page, and search index

### Adding a new component
1. Create in `src/components/` as an `.astro` file
2. Define props via TypeScript interface in the frontmatter
3. Use Tailwind utility classes for styling (no separate CSS files)

### Editing UI labels
Edit `src/i18n/en.json`. Active keys: `nav`, `catalog`, `doc_tabs`, `doc_labels`, `viewer`, `footer`.

## Commands

```bash
npm run dev      # Start dev server (http://localhost:4321)
npm run build    # Build static site → dist/
npm run preview  # Preview built site locally
```

## Deployment

Upload the `dist/` folder to any static webspace. The `.htaccess` in `public/` handles clean URLs and blocks direct `.md` file access.

### Adding a new Semantic Model
1. Create a subfolder under `src/data/markdown/` with the model's display name
2. Add the standard Markdown files (at minimum `model_documentation.md`)
3. Run `npm run build` — the model appears automatically in the catalog, detail page, and search index

### Adding a new component
1. Create in `src/components/` as an `.astro` file
2. Define props via TypeScript interface in the frontmatter
3. Use Tailwind utility classes for styling (no separate CSS files)

### Editing UI labels
Edit `src/i18n/en.json`. Active keys: `nav`, `catalog`, `doc_tabs`, `doc_labels`, `viewer`, `footer`.

```bash
npm run dev      # Start dev server (http://localhost:4321)
```

Upload the `dist/` folder to any static webspace. The `.htaccess` in `public/` handles clean URLs and blocks direct `.md` file access.
